title: Move the Eezi Move way
description: BEST OF GEORGE WINNER - This year’s...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BEST OF GEORGE WINNER - This year’s winners of the best moving company in the ‘Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards, go to Eezi Move Furniture Removals – for the second consecutive year!

Eezi Move Furniture Removals made its humble beginnings in the early 1990s in Sunnyside, Pretoria. What began as the selling and then delivering of furniture, metamorphosed into what is today known as Eezi Move.


> With the massive “semi-gration” to the Western Cape, Eezi Move finally opened its George branch in 2018 to service the Garden Route area. We have been privileged enough to take the branch to new heights each year, and for the last two years have been voted Best of George.


We believe that the success of the company lies in its attention to detail and seeing the move from the client's perspective.

At Eezi Move, we understand that moving is not something one does often, and when one does, it invokes considerable amounts of stress for the client. We strive to make the moving process as eezi and transparent as possible.

At Eezi Move we pride ourselves in catering to a wide variety of clientele. From moving a single fridge from Wilderness to Kathu, to large luxury homes, Eezi Move serves local moves within the Garden Route, Port Elizabeth, Cape Town, Durban, and Gauteng areas, as well as countrywide long-distance relocations.

At Eezi Move we prioritise integrity and zeal as our core operating values and reflect these values in our work. These values are embodied by our super team in George, whom without, this achievement would not have been possible. Every driver, packer, loader and porter - they are the soldiers that make all of this possible!

The exceptional work from these men materialized in an exciting move for the Eezi Move George team itself. Acquiring larger facilities in Brick street, it enables us to accommodate more clients for long and short term storage solutions.

Our daily inspiration comes from our amazing CEO and board of directors who are a constant source of encouragement to be better than the day before. They are the backbone, fiercely protecting these principles and ensuring sustainable employment, feeding over 250 families nationwide.

Additionally, the Eezi Move Team is also invigorated by the sensational customers we serve. Nothing inspires us more than to get that word of thanks that the move exceeded the client's expectations.

We as the Eezi Move team would like to extend our deepest gratitude to all of the Georgiete who awarded us their vote, and moreover, entrusting Eezi Move with their most valuable earthly possessions.

We are humbled and grateful for receiving this vote of confidence for the second year in a row. Eezi Move looks forward to continuing to serve the Garden Route Community.

The winning team from Eezi Move, Mornay Andries, Simpiwe France, Damiën Frans, Adriaane Zamile, Hendrik Hartzenberg, James Wessels, and Justin Frans.

This year’s winners of the best moving company in the ‘Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards, go to Eezi Move Furniture Removals – for the second consecutive year!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
